Find the right plan for your business

Compare Bob Go’s paid plans

Whether you’re just starting out or managing thousands of monthly shipments, Bob Go offers flexible plans designed to scale with your business.

Explore the features, pricing, and benefits that fit your shipping needs best.

Discounted Bob Pay transaction fees**
  • *Discounted rates vary by plan.
  • **Applies to Bob Pay-enabled merchants using integrated sales channels.
    ‍
  • Please note that the subscription fee is charged above and beyond the shipping fees charged for each parcel that is being shipped. The shipping fees will be based on your pricing plan and the relevant shipping discount. All payments are billed in South African Rands and include VAT. The shipping discounts and standard shipping rates are calculated at the discretion of Bob Go management and based on the rates charged by Bob Go’s courier partners.

Ready to ship smarter?

Join thousands of South African businesses simplifying their deliveries with Bob Go.

Start your free trial Book a demo

No queues, no stress. Just seamless shipping - right from your phone.
